tagline: Everything is an asset. Everything is governed. Everything is connected.

categories.name: Core Foundation
categories.blurb: The canonical model and governed services everything else composes from.

products.name: Fabric
products.tagline: The semantic foundation of the platform.
products.description: The canonical, schema.org-aligned primitive layer — 11 root primitives that bind every module into one governed, connected model.
features: The weave through every other module
products.connects: Defines the vocabulary (Identity, Policy, Event, Capability…) every other product uses.

products.name: Fabric DB
products.tagline: A cloud-native database with governance built in.
products.description: Managed, schema.org-native, cloud-native database where lineage and policy are first-class — not bolted on. Plane one of the fabric.
products.connects: The system of record for Catalog & Govern; expands into the full fabric.

products.name: Schema DB
products.description: A versioned registry of canonical types and contexts, so every system means the same thing by the same term.
products.connects: Backs Fabric's primitive definitions and every catalog.

products.name: Entity Registry
products.description: Canonical, resolvable identifiers for every real-world entity across domains.
products.connects: Resolves the Identity and Thing primitives at global scale.

products.name: Knowledge Graph
products.description: Stores reified relationships so isolated assets become a living, navigable graph.
products.connects: Materializes the Relationship primitive across all assets.

products.name: Identity Fabric
products.description: Resolves any identifier into a unified identity graph across 13 social and corporate IdPs, with RESOLVE / ENRICH / AUDIT modes.
products.connects: The runtime for the Identity primitive; powers customer-360 and IAM audit.

products.name: Governance Platform
products.description: Compose Constraints into Policies, run approval workflows, and prove compliance with an immutable audit trail.
products.connects: Operationalizes the Policy, Constraint and Event primitives.

categories.name: Data & AI
categories.blurb: Connect, trust, and activate data across the estate.

products.name: Data Platform
products.description: Connect and virtualize sources into one governed plane without forcing everything into one store.
products.connects: The Connect plane of the fabric.

products.name: Data Catalog
products.description: An active-metadata catalog that makes every dataset findable, described, and governed.
products.connects: The Catalog plane; reads Fabric primitives.

products.name: Data Quality
products.description: Define and enforce quality Constraints, with violations recorded as Events.
products.connects: Uses Constraint and Event primitives.

products.name: Data Observability
products.description: Monitor freshness, volume, schema drift, and lineage across pipelines in real time.
products.connects: Consumes Event streams from Fabric DB.

products.name: Feature Store
products.description: Serve consistent, governed features to training and inference with full lineage.
products.connects: Activates governed data for ML.

products.name: Semantic Search
products.description: Vector + graph search over cataloged assets so people and agents find data by intent.
products.connects: The Activate plane; queries the Knowledge Graph.

products.name: Knowledge Ingestion
products.description: Pipelines that extract entities and relationships from raw sources into the graph.
products.connects: Populates Entity Registry and Knowledge Graph.

categories.name: Agent Ecosystem
categories.blurb: Govern what autonomous agents can do, and why.

products.name: Agent Runtime
products.description: Execute agents whose every Capability is exercised under Policy and recorded as an Event.
products.connects: Runs the Capability primitive under governance.

products.name: Agent Registry
products.description: Discover and version the agents and capabilities available across the platform.
products.connects: Catalogs Capability and Identity (agent) primitives.

products.name: Agent Skills
products.description: Packaged, reusable skills (like the Identity Fabric skill) agents compose to get work done.
products.connects: Concrete implementations of Capabilities.

products.name: Agent Memory
products.description: Persistent, governed memory so agents retain context across sessions.
products.connects: Stores State and Event histories for agents.

products.name: Agent Evals
products.description: Evaluate agents against Objectives with measurable metrics and evidence.
products.connects: Measures progress against the Objective primitive.

products.name: Agent Governance
products.description: Guardrails, approval gates, and budgets that constrain what agents may do.
products.connects: Applies Policy/Constraint to agent Capabilities.

categories.name: Publishing & Discovery
categories.blurb: Open, governed data — published and discoverable.

products.name: Open Data World
products.description: The public face of the platform — open, governed datasets anyone can discover and use.
products.connects: Publishes governed assets to the world.

products.name: Data Marketplace
products.description: A marketplace for data products with built-in licensing, policy, and provenance.
products.connects: Monetizes governed data products.

products.name: Data Directory
products.description: A browsable directory of datasets across publishers and domains.
products.connects: Indexes the Dataset Registry.

products.name: Research Publishing
products.description: Publish research with linked, versioned, citable datasets and full provenance.
products.connects: Links Objectives, Evidence and datasets.

products.name: Dataset Registry
products.description: Canonical registration, versioning, and DOI-style identifiers for datasets.
products.connects: Tracks dataset Thing + State primitives.

categories.name: Platform Engineering
categories.blurb: The runtime, APIs, and tools that ship the platform.

products.name: Platform Core
products.description: The shared runtime, eventing, and orchestration every module runs on.
products.connects: Hosts and connects all modules.

products.name: Platform API
products.description: A unified, contract-first API (the proto contract) across every primitive and module.
products.connects: Exposes the Fabric primitive contracts.

products.name: Platform UI
products.description: The web console to explore the catalog, manage policy, and view lineage.
products.connects: Front-end over Platform API.

products.name: Platform CLI
products.description: Manage and script the fabric from the command line.
products.connects: Thin client over Platform API.

products.name: Platform SDK
products.description: Typed SDKs (from the proto contract) to build apps and agents on the platform.
products.connects: Client libraries for the Fabric contracts.
